doctrine: THE single evidence registry (audit #9). Every displayed edge claim traces to a script + a dated verdict here. A number not in this file is a rumor. Statuses: VALIDATED (cleared the kill-test bar + MC placebo), MARGINAL (real but thin — effective N or t-stat limits), PAPER (pre-registered, accruing signals, NOT live), THIN (real but too small to matter after friction), NOT_VALIDATED (tested, failed the bar — do not arm), KILLED (tested, rejected — do not resurrect without fundamentally new data).

edges.name: Fear-Spike Dip — names (No.3)
edges.headline: +3.4% /13td over drift (VIX 24-35 band + credit ok + dip, quality names)
edges.note: Survives the CLUSTERED null (fear-week correlation can't fake it). Next-open fills cost ~0.5pp (backtest_nextopen.py). Per-name MC: TSLA p=.000, XOM .002, JPM .003, MRVL .021, NOW .026, AAPL .027, CRWD .033, MSFT .037. NVDA dip-edge is ZERO (p=.53) and AVGO NEGATIVE (p=.93) — the NO_DIP rule is measured, not opinion.

edges.name: Conviction tier + crest (No.3 sizing)
edges.headline: dip >=8% + VIX >=22 + credit ok = +5.69 robust (n=163); full size on CRESTING fear
edges.note: Survives ex-2020 (+3.37) and pre-2024 (+6.49). Crest refinement: VIX >=1.5pts off its 5d high = +7.4 mean / +4.0 robust vs +2.8 while fear still builds — first-tranche-only while VIX rises.

edges.name: Index Barrel (No.3i, VIX>=30 fresh cross)
edges.headline: +11.15% /63td at real next-open fills (SPY)
edges.note: Real but statistically MARGINAL — the honest grade the audit demanded. One position per episode; 24 is DEAD as an entry, 30+ only; trade the underlying or deep-ITM (63d spreads bleed 8-15% to bid/ask).

edges.name: Crisis Ladder (No.6)
edges.headline: -25% rung: p=.009 @252td (+32%, 4/4 campaigns); 55y record 88% of 16 profitable
edges.note: The -20 rung did NOT clear the hard null (p=.16) — the -25 DEPTH is what times; generic below-line buying carries -20. SPX-timed Nasdaq -25 = +44%, p=.019. LEAPS expression: deep-ITM 0.8-delta 24mo Jan-chain at -20/-25 ONLY, never at -10 (worst -97%), never ATM/OTM into fresh IV. SPY shares carry the campaign; exit ALL on first 200d reclaim.

edges.name: Strength Rotation (nrs)
edges.headline: BETA, not alpha (beta 1.64, alpha ~0) — ~+4%/qtr after the survivorship haircut
edges.note: Run as a DIVERSIFIED shares basket, hard-off at fear onset. It is the bull-regime ride, not a stock-picking edge — never market it as alpha. Chasing breakouts as an ENTRY stays negative at every horizon.

edges.name: Put-Credit Spreads (No.8a)
edges.headline: ~+3% of risk per trade, fear-gated (arm VIX>=24) — tail-fragile
edges.source: Stage-3 kill test · paper desk (bar: 10 A-prints)
edges.note: One unfiltered gap through both strikes = -100% of risk; a bad tail cuts the edge to ~+1%. The gate is mandatory (Chicago Fed 2025: UNgated index option selling = zero alpha over 15y).

edges.name: Sector Fast-Crash TURN (No.5)
edges.headline: sector ETF <=-15%/21d + FIRST 5d turn >=+3% -> +1.40/+3.36 robust @63-126td vs SPY
edges.note: The TURN is load-bearing — blind crash-buys and MA-reclaim timing both fail. Fast crash >> slow grind. Quality sectors carry it; XLE/XLF/XBI-style traps bleed. Expression: ETF shares or deep-ITM Jan-chain, never ATM into fresh IV.

edges.name: Stock-basket -20% rung (63td)
edges.headline: +7.9% edge, CI [4.0, 11.9] — but p=.095 (luck does it ~1 in 10)
edges.note: A-tier basket only, -20/-30 first touches, >=5 names, NEVER below -40 (-50 = the cliff: fallen cohort median -11.7). Survivorship tax ~6pp measured via the fallen-cohort control.

edges.name: Bubble filter (Nasdaq stand-down)
edges.headline: prior-year extension >=+25% = stand down; calm-origin crashes +26.5 (p=.065), bubble-origin WORSE than chance (p=.063)
edges.note: Sign-consistent across all 12 cells but n=3 bubble episodes — engraved as PAPER doctrine, not a live gate. S&P rungs = the clock for Nasdaq buys.

edges.name: F&G velocity (index trigger)
edges.headline: F&G falling >=10pts/10d + credit ok = +2.0 robust (fear ARRIVING beats fear LEVEL)
edges.note: F&G LEVEL gates failed everywhere (best rank 219/717) — the slow legs hold you 'in fear' through dead zones. VIX stays the clean panic dial; this velocity variant is the only F&G survivor.

edges.name: Calm Drift (No.1)
edges.headline: +0.3-0.9% per event @10td on megacaps — shares only
edges.note: Real (50-90 episodes per name, median-positive, ~60-66% win) but option friction kills it — SPY +0.35, QQQ +0.59, META +0.92, NVDA/ASML +1.25 per event. Garnish, never the meal.

edges.name: Sector-LEAPS long-hold reversion
edges.headline: buy beaten sector + 1-2y LEAPS: best cell p=.119 — random already-down days did as well
edges.note: 4 triggers x 15 ETFs x 252/504td, episode-clustered placebo. The fat LEAPS returns (+40-90% on premium) are leverage on market beta — a SPY LEAPS same-window matches without the sector-trap tails (XLE/XLU/XLP/KRE bleed every trigger). What survives is already engraved as No.5 + the crisis rungs.

edges.name: Breakout momentum (No.2)
edges.headline: no edge over holding QQQ — failed 3 walk-forwards
edges.note: Positive only at overfit grid boundaries; single names -0.25 to -3.03. The only survivor is the mirror: trim into strength (+5% target beats the 8% stop 81% vs 76%) as an EXIT rule.

edges.name: 200d-reclaim entries
edges.headline: 21td = noise; 63td = catastrophic tails (ARM -41%, MU -25% edge)
edges.note: Do not add. The reclaim is No.6's EXIT signal, never an entry.

edges.name: Extension/drain shorts
edges.headline: 648 configs, EVERY one negative robust (ext>=40 shorts lose -4 to -6.6%/hold)
edges.note: Extension is fuel, not a fuse. Post-crack parabolas are coin-flips BOTH directions — no touch, either way.

edges.name: VIX-curve capitulation buy
edges.headline: the +8.2% was 2 recoveries triple-counted (overlapping windows) -> +0.3% de-clustered
edges.note: Just a VIX>30 proxy with a knife-edge parameter. Removing the dislocation VETO stays correct — it's just not a standalone BUY.

edges.name: Golden cross as return edge
edges.headline: the 'beats buy&hold' was a cash-yield artifact — it LAGS at 0% cash
edges.note: The drawdown-halving is real = INSURANCE only (and gave zero DD benefit on US large-caps the last 16y). Never alpha.

edges.name: Semis pullback / Software kiss / VIX carry (n7smh, n7igv, n8b)
edges.headline: semis beta / drift-not-bounce / cost-negative — all three retired from the paper desk
edges.note: n7smh vanished in 2022 (just semis beta), n7igv's last 18mo were negative (drift, not a bounce), n8b went net-negative under cost stress.

edges.name: Per-name bespoke gates
edges.headline: 17/20 mined winners failed holdout (PLTR train +16.6 -> holdout -19.96); mining ceiling = placebo ceiling
edges.source: 17.5M-variant deep search + placebo lie detector · BACKTEST_FINDINGS.md
edges.note: Names choose their TIER within the universal gates; they never get bespoke gates. Never re-mine the same price data — the recoverable EV lives in execution, the unvisited A-quadrant, and paper graduations.
